'''âdh-ng-ng-m''' ('''kadhangngemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exaggerate|exaggerate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exaggerate|exaggerate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-ng-ng-m
|-
! Lemma
| kadhangngemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhangemoko|thidhangemoko]] || [[word:jidhangemoko|jidhangemoko]] || [[word:shidhangemoko|shidhangemoko]] || [[word:kidhangemoko|kidhangemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhangemoko|thuthudhangemoko]] || [[word:jujudhangemoko|jujudhangemoko]] || [[word:shushudhangemoko|shushudhangemoko]] || [[word:kukudhangemoko|kukudhangemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhangemoko|thudhangemoko]] || [[word:judhangemoko|judhangemoko]] || [[word:shudhangemoko|shudhangemoko]] || [[word:kudhangemoko|kudhangemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhangemoko|thudhangemoko]] || [[word:judhangemoko|judhangemoko]] || [[word:shudhangemoko|shudhangemoko]] || [[word:kudhangemoko|kudhangemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhangemoko|thedhangemoko]] || [[word:jedhangemoko|jedhangemoko]] || [[word:shedhangemoko|shedhangemoko]] || [[word:kedhangemoko|kedhangemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhangemoko|thothodhangemoko]] || [[word:jojodhangemoko|jojodhangemoko]] || [[word:shoshodhangemoko|shoshodhangemoko]] || [[word:kokodhangemoko|kokodhangemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhangemoko|thodhangemoko]] || [[word:jodhangemoko|jodhangemoko]] || [[word:shodhangemoko|shodhangemoko]] || [[word:kodhangemoko|kodhangemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhangemoko|thodhangemoko]] || [[word:jodhangemoko|jodhangemoko]] || [[word:shodhangemoko|shodhangemoko]] || [[word:kodhangemoko|kodhangemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhangemoko|thĂŠdhangemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhangemoko|jĂŠdhangemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhangemoko|shĂŠdhangemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhangemoko|kĂŠdhangemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhangemoko|thathadhangemoko]] || [[word:jajadhangemoko|jajadhangemoko]] || [[word:shashadhangemoko|shashadhangemoko]] || [[word:kakadhangemoko|kakadhangemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhangemoko|thadhangemoko]] || [[word:jadhangemoko|jadhangemoko]] || [[word:shadhangemoko|shadhangemoko]] || [[word:kadhangemoko|kadhangemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhangemoko|thadhangemoko]] || [[word:jadhangemoko|jadhangemoko]] || [[word:shadhangemoko|shadhangemoko]] || [[word:kadhangemoko|kadhangemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
